user.title: Frigate connection
user.description: Enter your Frigate server details. Fields are pre-filled if the Frigate integration is installed.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Frigate. Check the URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your username and password.

abort.already_configured: Frigate Event Manager is already configured.

user.title: Add a camera
user.description: Select a camera from your Frigate instance.

data_description.notification_title: Variables: camera, objects (list), label, zones (list), severity, score, start_time, review_id. Example: 🚨 {{ camera | title }} — {{ objects | join(', ') }}
data_description.notification_message: Variables: camera, objects (list), label, zones (list), severity, score, start_time, review_id. Example: {{ severity | upper }} at {{ start_time | timestamp_custom('%H:%M') }}{% if zones %} · {{ zones | join(', ') }}{% endif %}
data_description.critical_template: Jinja2 condition evaluated before each notification. If true: iOS critical alert + Android high-priority channel. Variables: camera, severity, objects, zones, start_time. Example: {{ severity == 'alert' }}
